destinations.evidence: The regular transaction execution path consults parent-state AsyncJobTracker-backed sender-lock logic and skips both true results and registry read errors.
The helper implements the same allow/skip cases as the invariant: no jobs allow, settled or expired jobs allow, existing-job fulfillment allows, otherwise sender-locked transactions skip.
The verifier uses the same contract-backed sender job and existing-job fulfillment semantics, which anchors builder/verifier parity.

equivalence_argument: The payload builder and verifier both use AsyncJobTracker parent/contract state via ritual-async-registry. The builder skips only when the helper says the sender is locked and the tx is not an existing-job fulfillment, and it skips on read errors to avoid producing blocks the verifier would reject.
rationale: The builder creates a StateProviderDatabase from the same state provider used for payload construction, calls should_skip_sender_locked_tx, and uses unwrap_or(true) so database or registry read failures skip inclusion rather than producing a block the verifier rejects. This result keeps the candidate as a distinct refined invariant because the bounded assignment packet does not contain a newer candidate that clearly supersedes it. Implementation-detail caveat: The helper placement in ritual-async-registry is local organization; the durable behavior is builder/verifier agreement on sender lock source of truth.
statement: Before including a transaction, the payload builder must check the sender lock against AsyncJobTracker contract state, not local pool state; if the contract-state check errors, the transaction must be skipped.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create parent state where AsyncJobTracker.senderJobs for a sender contains an unsettled job while the local pool sender index is stale or empty. Assert payload building skips a new non-fulfillment transaction from that sender, and assert a forced storage-read error also skips the transaction.
summary: Builder sender-lock checks use contract state and skip on read errors.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create parent state where AsyncJobTracker.senderJobs for a sender contains an unsettled job while the local pool sender index is stale or empty. Assert payload building skips a new non-fulfillment transaction from that sender, and assert a forced storage-read error also skips the transaction.
title: Builder sender lock uses contract state
